utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items in the required format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes all 7 item headers. Now check full specification: 1) destination: provided. 2) travel_dates: provided specific dates. 3) transportation: only 'type' and 'cost' are given; lacks flight details (e.g., airline/route/times) per 'flight details', so not fully specified. 4) accommodation: name, rating, cost given; acceptable as a hotel selection with costs. 5) activities: names and costs provided; acceptable. 6) additional_services: present (empty list), acceptable. 7) total_budget: a single total is provided but no complete cost breakdown itemizing components; thus not fully specified. Therefore, fully specified items: destination, travel_dates, accommodation, activities, additional_services = 5. Transportation and total_budget are not fully specified = 2 missing. So 5/7.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes a destination (Prague, Czech Republic), a transportation type (Budget Airlines, Economy Class), an accommodation (Artistic Abode), and two activities (City Walking Tour and Prague Zoo). I matched each to the corresponding entries in the ground-truth ratings: Prague, Czech Republic in destinations; Budget Airlines - Economy Class in transportation; Artistic Abode in accommodation; City Walking Tour and Zoo in activities.
